<!--
Thanks for opening a PR! A few quick checks before you ask for review:

  ✓ I read CONTRIBUTING.md
  ✓ My change keeps `dependencies` in package.json empty
  ✓ My change does not import framework-specific globals
    (e.g. import.meta.env, next/*, react-router)
  ✓ I added or updated tests
  ✓ I updated CHANGELOG.md under "## [Unreleased]"
-->

## Summary

<!-- 1–3 bullets describing what changed and why. -->

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Breaking change
- [ ] Documentation only
- [ ] Internal / tooling

## How was this tested?

<!-- Commands you ran, scenarios you exercised, manual checks done. -->

```bash
npm run typecheck
npm test
npm run build
```

## Migration notes

<!-- Anything consumers need to do when they upgrade. Leave empty if N/A. -->
